case_title: XUELIAN STUART VS. PHILIPPINE AIR LINE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF HEARING: 6/29/21 @ 1:30PM SERVED APR-09-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PHILIPPINE AIR LINE JOSEPH RECIO - AUTH AGENT FOR SERVICE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-29-2021 - CONTINUED FOR CANTONESE INTERPRETER TO SEP-02-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF XUELIAN STUART IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PHILIPINE AIRLINE REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH RECIO, FINANCE & AMDIN MANGER IS PRESENT. JOSE DALA - ACCOUNTING OFFICER IN CHARGE WITH SF STATION IS PRESENT. SC-109 NOT SUBMITTED. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS A CONTINUCE TO ALLOW FOR A CANTONESE INTERPERTER. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE, NO APPEARANCES. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
